hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$' && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/'; then cd frontend && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$' && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/'; then cd frontend && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
cd frontend && npx prettier --check src/ 2>&1 && npm run lint 2>&1
